text.title: Remote 1:1 Async Fallback Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: post prompts → IC responds → PM ack → escalate-if-unresponsive → quarterly review.

step.name: post-prompts
step.action: Run `compose-prompts`. Post Async11Note skeleton to the private doc with timestamp. Notify IC with the response window.

step.name: ic-responds
step.action: IC responds in `ic_response` block within `response_window_business_hours`. Empty answers acceptable; missing answers are not.

step.name: pm-ack
step.action: Run `synthesise-response`. PM writes `pm_ack.next_actions` with owner_role + deadline_sprint. Acknowledges within 24h of IC response.

step.name: escalate-if-unresponsive
step.action: Run `escalation-decision`. If IC unresponsive past response window, increment `unresponsive_count`. Count == 1 → schedule synchronous reschedule; count >= 2 → escalate to IC's manager.
step.decision-gate: If `unresponsive_count >= 2`, do NOT proceed to next async cycle until synchronous contact made.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. If response-rate trend < 80% over 4 cycles, propose pair-restructure or sync-mandate.
